backstory.original: Modrons are the embodiment of law and order, marching in lockstep through the planes. But when Nordom Whistleklik was separated from his fellow modrons, the essence of chaos infected this rogue quadrone. Now with his crossbow-shaped gear spirits in hand, he works to fit his complex new outlook into his logical-if quirky-understanding of the planes.
backstory.display: 魔冢是法律和秩序的化身，在各个位面上步调一致地前进。但是当诺顿·威斯特尔克里克与他的同伴魔冢分开时，混乱的本质感染了这个游荡者四元冢。现在，他带着他的弩形装备魂灵，努力将他复杂的新观念融入他对位面的逻辑——尽管是古怪的——理解。

description.original: Nordom simultaneously fires two crossbows at the closest two enemies.
description.display: 诺顿向最近的两名敌人同时射出两发弩矢。

longDescription.original: Two gear spirits have taken the form of crossbows, which Nordom fires simultaneously at the closest two enemies. If only one enemy remains, he'll instead hit it twice.
longDescription.display: 两位装备魂灵化为弩矢形态，由诺顿同时射向最近的两名敌人。如果只有一名敌人，则改为向它射击两次。

description.original: A multitude of modrons march through pushing back and damaging enemies as they pass by.
description.display: 大量魔冢向前行进，击退敌人并对经过的敌人造成伤害。

longDescription.original: A multitude of modrons march from left to right over 15 seconds, pushing all enemies back a short distance and dealing ongoing massive damage as they pass by.
longDescription.display: 大量魔冢从左向右行进，持续 15 秒，将所有敌人击退一小段距离，并在经过时持续造成巨额伤害。

description.original: Nordom boosts the damage of Champions in the column in front of him.
description.display: 诺顿会提高他前列勇士的伤害。

conditions.desc: $(source_hero) increases the damage of all Champions in the two columns ahead of him by $(amount)%.
$(source_hero) increases the damage of all Champions in the one column ahead of him by $(amount)%.
$(source_hero)会使他前面两列中所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。
$(source_hero)会使他前面一列中所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Nordom buffs all Champions in the column in front of him.
tipText.display: 诺顿会为处于他前列的所有勇士提供增益。

conditions.desc: Nordom increases the effect of Form Orderly Ranks and potentially augments his own abilities depending on which Modron Core you have assigned to the current adventuring party. Buffs stack multiplicatively.

Nordom increases the effect of Form Orderly Ranks and potentially augments his own abilities depending on which Modron Core you have assigned to the current adventuring party. Buffs stack multiplicatively.^^Modest Core$(nordom_modron_core_active 1): $(amount)% for each unique species in the formation.^Strong Core$(nordom_modron_core_active 2): $(amount)% for each Champion with a total ability score of 78 or higher in the formation.^Fast Core$(nordom_modron_core_active 3): $(amount)% for each Speed Champion in the formation.^Magic Core$(nordom_modron_core_active 4): $(amount)% for each Champion with a magic base attack in the formation, and Nordom's crossbows count as Ranged/Magic attacks.^Aerois Core$(nordom_modron_core_active 5): $(amount___2)% for each Heroes of Aerois Champion in the formation, and Nordom gains the Heroes of Aerois affiliation.^Unaffiliated Core$(nordom_modron_core_active 6): $(amount)% for each unaffiliated Champion in the formation.^Dexterous Core$(nordom_modron_core_active 7): $(amount)% for each Champion with a Dexterity of 15 or higher in the formation.^Lawful Core or No Core$(nordom_modron_core_active -1): $(amount)% for each Lawful Champion in the formation.
根据你为当前探险队配备的魔冢核心，诺顿会提高“有序列队”的效果，并可能会增强他自身的技能。增益效果以乘算方式堆叠。

根据你为当前探险队配备的魔冢核心，诺顿会提高“有序列队”的效果，并可能会增强他自身的技能。增益效果以乘算方式堆叠。^^谦逊核心$(nordom_modron_core_active 1)：阵型中每有一个独特种族，提高 $(amount)%。^强壮核心$(nordom_modron_core_active 2)：阵型中每有一名总属性值大于等于 78 的勇士，提高 $(amount)%。^快速核心$(nordom_modron_core_active 3)：阵型中每有一名速度型勇士，提高 $(amount)%。^魔法核心$(nordom_modron_core_active 4)：阵型中每有一名以魔法为基本攻击的勇士，提高 $(amount)%，并且诺顿的十字弩算作远程/魔法攻击。^埃罗伊斯核心$(nordom_modron_core_active 5)：阵型中每有一名“埃罗伊斯的英雄们”勇士，提高 $(amount___2)%，并且诺顿算作“埃罗伊斯的英雄们”从属组织成员。^无从属核心$(nordom_modron_core_active 6)：阵型中每有一名无从属组织勇士，提高 $(amount)%。^灵巧核心$(nordom_modron_core_active 7)：阵型中每有一名敏捷大于等于 15 的勇士，提高 $(amount)%。^守序核心或无核心$(nordom_modron_core_active -1)：阵型中每有一名守序勇士，提高 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Nordom increases the bonus of his main buff by methods that depend on the assigned Modron Core, and he also increases the XP earned by that core when a specific specialization is chosen.
tipText.display: 诺顿会根据分配的魔冢核心，以不同的方式提升他主要增益的加成，当选择特定的专精时，他还会增加该核心获得的经验。

description.desc: Nordom increases the effect of Form Orderly Ranks by $(not_buffed amount)% for each BASE adventure you have completed in the Grand Tour campaign, stacking multiplicatively.
你每完成一项“剑湾之旅”战役中的基础冒险，诺顿会使“有序列队”的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 已完成的“剑湾之旅”冒险数量：$num_stacks

specializationDescription.original: A curious modron always loves a good Tour of the Forgotten Realms.
specializationDescription.display: 好奇的魔冢总是很喜欢来一场精彩的被遗忘的国度之旅。

description.desc: Nordom increases the amount of experience gained on the Modron Core attached to his adventuring party when completing new areas by $amount%
诺顿会使完成新区域时附加在他所在探险队中的魔冢核心获得的经验数量增加 $amount%

specializationDescription.original: Nordom focuses on increasing the rate your Modron Core gains experience.
specializationDescription.display: 诺顿专注于提高你的魔冢核心获得经验的几率。

description.desc: Nordom gains Core Competency stacks based on the total level of all of your Modron cores. The effect of Form Orderly Ranks is increased by $(nordom_core_competency_bonus)% for each Core Competency stack, stacking multiplicatively.
根据你所有魔冢核心的总等级，诺顿会获得“核心能力”堆叠层数。每有一层“核心能力”堆叠层数，“有序列队”的效果提高 $(nordom_core_competency_bonus)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Once enough time is spent leveling your Modron Cores, Nordom can greatly increase the damage of his allies.
specializationDescription.display: 一旦你花了足够的时间来升级你的魔冢核心，诺顿就可以大幅提高他盟友的伤害。

conditions.desc: Nordom gains Pipe Puzzle stacks based on the status of the outputs in all active Modron Cores you have equipped across all parties. The effect of Form Orderly Ranks is increased by 25% for each Pipe Puzzle stack, stacking multiplicatively.

Nordom gains Pipe Puzzle stacks based on the status of the outputs in all active Modron Cores you have equipped across all parties. The effect of Form Orderly Ranks is increased by 25% for each Pipe Puzzle stack, stacking multiplicatively. You gain Pipe Puzzle stacks for having:^$(nordom_powered_outputs_count)
根据你为所有探险队装备的所有激活魔冢核心的输出状态，诺顿会获得“管道拼图”堆叠层数。每有一层“管道拼图”堆叠层数，“有序列队”的效果提高 25%，以乘算方式堆叠。
根据你为所有探险队装备的所有激活魔冢核心的输出状态，诺顿会获得“管道拼图”堆叠层数。每有一层“管道拼图”堆叠层数，“有序列队”的效果提高 25%，以乘算方式堆叠。你因以下数量的输出状态而获得了“管道拼图”堆叠层数：^$(nordom_powered_outputs_count)

description.original: Once I was 'one'. Now I am 'one', but it is a smaller, louder 'one'.
description.display: 曾经我是“一个”。现在我是“一个”，但变得更小、更有力的“一个”。

description.original: Preferred designation is 'fearsome cubed warrior'.
description.display: 喜欢被称作“可怕的立方体战士”。

description.original: Command: Increase combat output by fifty percent.
description.display: 命令：提高战斗输出 50%。

description.original: Target is acquired.
description.display: 目标被擒。

description.original: Only I choose where I go.
description.display: 只有我能选择我的去向。

description.original: Announcement: I will now bring greater balance to our formation!
description.display: 宣告：现在，我会为我们的阵营带来更大均衡！

description.original: One. One. One. One... Two? Two! TWO!
description.display: 一。一。一。一……二？二！二！

effects.description: Changes Form Orderly Ranks to target the next two columns

description.original: Many considerations must be made.
description.display: 必须考虑许多因素。

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Nordom's Core Programming ability by $amount%

description.original: We... march?

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Nordom's Core Programming ability by $amount%

description.original: It is dangerous to march alone.
description.display: 独自行走是很危险的。

description.original: Overheat detected. Outputs disabled. Recommendation: revert last action.
description.display: 检测到过热，已禁止输出。建议：撤销上一步操作。

description.original: It looks like you're attempting to achieve supercharged output. Would you like help?
description.display: 看来你想实现增压输出。要不要帮忙？

description.original: Zero. One. Zero. One. Zero. One...
description.display: 零，一。零，一。零，一……

effects.description: Increases the effect of Nordom's Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: Encouragement: Let's get flowing!
description.display: 鼓舞：让我们开始行动吧！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Nordom's Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: Making this gear swap will be very efficient.
description.display: 这种装备交换将非常有效。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Nordom's Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: Statement of core belief: bigger numbers are better numbers.
description.display: 核心信念陈述：数字越大越好。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Nordom's Core Competency Specialization by $(amount)% for each max level Modron Core you own

description.original: Modification enabled. Allies are encouraged to not stand behind targets.
description.display: 已启用修改。建议盟友不要站在目标后面。

effects.description: Nordom gains the Debuff role and enemies hit by his base attacks take 400% more damage. Does not stack

description.original: Modification enabled. Allies are encouraged to maintain a safe distance.
description.display: 已启用修改。建议盟友保持安全距离。

effects.description: Nordom gains the Control role and his base attacks explode in a small radius, dealing 1 hit to all enemies in the area and knocking them back a short distance

description.original: These are not crossbows. They are gear spirits formed like crossbows.
description.display: 这些不是十字弩。它们是十字弩形状的装备魂灵。

description.original: My crossbows and I wish to go in search of trouble.
description.display: 我和我的十字弩想去寻找麻烦。

description.original: Permission to part with these crossbows is denied.
description.display: 不可以放弃这些十字弩。

description.original: They do not require reloading. They are always ready to fire.
description.display: 它们不需要重新装填弹药。它们随时准备开火。

description.original: It is advisable to aim the pointy ends outward.
description.display: 最好是将尖头的两端向外瞄准。

description.original: I am prepared for maximum 25 enemies. Fewer enemies = multiple bolts per enemy
description.display: 我准备了最多25个敌人份的。敌人较少=每个敌人多支弩箭

description.original: These are 27% more effective. Give or take 3%
description.display: 它们的效率提升了 27%。误差不超过 3%。

description.original: Additional forms provide multitudinous functions.
description.display: 额外的形态提供了多种功能。

description.original: It functions but should be replaced soon.
description.display: 能用，但应该很快就会被换掉。

description.original: You must stand closer to this unit so I can assess your weaknesses.
description.display: 你必须站在离这个单位近一些的位置，这样我才能评估你的弱点。

description.original: Improvements have made this tool significantly more useful.
description.display: 改进后，这个工具的实用性大大增加了。

description.original: I can assess your weaknesses from Mechanus itself now!
description.display: 我现在可以从机械境评估你的弱点！

description.original: Functionality is at minimum threshold.
description.display: 功能处于最低阈值。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Nordom's Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: To be used, the angle must be adjusted. It may be preferable for me to creak.
description.display: 使用时，必须调整角度。我可能更喜欢吱吱呀呀的声音。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Nordom's Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: Smoothly running gears are a simple pleasure.
description.display: 平稳运作的零件是一种简单的享受。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Nordom's Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: All seams are optimal and ready for high stress!
description.display: 所有的接缝都处于最佳状态，并准备好接受高压力的工作！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Nordom's Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: This gear can replace a broken one, but it is not an improvement.
description.display: 它可以取代破损的零件，但这算不上什么改进。

description.original: Some machine is missing a vital component. Oh well -- more for me!
description.display: 有些机器缺少一个重要部件。哦，好吧--对我来说，多了！

description.original: Synchronization=superior function
description.display: 同步率代表着出色的性能。

description.original: Properly placed these will improve capabilities on multiple levels.
description.display: 适当放置这些将在多个层面上提高能力。

description.original: I have been holding onto this.
description.display: 我一直坚守着它。

description.original: The quantity is cumbersome.
description.display: 有零有整。

description.original: This is inefficient for purposes of seeing. But it is pleasantly shiny!
description.display: 对看东西没什么帮助。但它的光泽度真是赏心悦目！

description.original: This is a dangerous artifact. Why no one has taken it from me is a puzzle.
description.display: 这是一件危险的工艺品。为什么没有人从我这里拿走它，这是一个谜。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Nonbinary Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a STR score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a INT score of 13 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Lawful Champions by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Modrons are the embodiment of law and order, marching in lockstep through the planes. But when Nordom Whistleklik was separated from his fellow modrons, the essence of chaos infected this rogue quadrone. Now with his crossbow-shaped gear spirits in hand, he works to fit his complex new outlook into his logical-if quirky-understanding of the planes.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Nordom is a Support Champion that increases the XP earned by modron cores while buffing Champions in front of him.

event_upgrades.name: Form Orderly Ranks
event_upgrades.description: Nordom boosts the damage of Champions in the column in front of him.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 魔冢是法律和秩序的化身，在各个位面上步调一致地前进。但是当诺顿·威斯特尔克里克与他的同伴魔冢分开时，混乱的本质感染了这个游荡者四元冢。现在，他带着他的弩形装备魂灵，努力将他复杂的新观念融入他对位面的逻辑——尽管是古怪的——理解。

display.name: 穿刺箭
display.description: 已启用修改。建议盟友不要站在目标后面。

effects.description: 诺顿获得减益角色定位，被他的基本攻击击中的敌人会多受到 400% 的伤害。不可堆叠

original.name: Explosive Bolts
original.description: Modification enabled. Allies are encouraged to maintain a safe distance.

effects.description: Nordom gains the Control role and his base attacks explode in a small radius, dealing 1 hit to all enemies in the area and knocking them back a short distance

display.name: 爆裂箭
display.description: 已启用修改。建议盟友保持安全距离。

effects.description: 诺顿获得控制角色定位，他的基本攻击会引发小范围爆炸，对范围内的所有敌人造成 1 次打击，并将他们击退一小段距离

original.name: Augmented Ranks
original.description: One. One. One. One... Two? Two! TWO!

effects.description: Changes Form Orderly Ranks to target the next two columns

display.name: 强化的队列
display.description: 一。一。一。一……二？二！二！

effects.description: 使“有序列队”的目标改变为下两列

original.name: Rusty Crossbows
original.description: These are not crossbows. They are gear spirits formed like crossbows.

display.name: 腐蚀的十字弩
display.description: 这些不是十字弩。它们是十字弩形状的装备魂灵。

original.name: Worn Gear Spirits
original.description: My crossbows and I wish to go in search of trouble.

display.name: 破旧的装备魂灵
display.description: 我和我的十字弩想去寻找麻烦。

original.name: Beloved Crossbows
original.description: Permission to part with these crossbows is denied.

display.name: 挚爱的十字弩
display.description: 不可以放弃这些十字弩。

original.name: Ready Gear Spirits
original.description: They do not require reloading. They are always ready to fire.

display.name: 严阵以待的装备魂灵
display.description: 它们不需要重新装填弹药。它们随时准备开火。

original.name: Functional Bolts
original.description: It is advisable to aim the pointy ends outward.

display.name: 实用的箭
display.description: 最好是将尖头的两端向外瞄准。

original.name: Usable Bolts
original.description: I am prepared for maximum 25 enemies. Fewer enemies = multiple bolts per enemy

display.name: 备用弩箭
display.description: 我准备了最多25个敌人份的。敌人较少=每个敌人多支弩箭

original.name: Improved Bolts
original.description: These are 27% more effective. Give or take 3%

display.name: 改良的箭
display.description: 它们的效率提升了 27%。误差不超过 3%。

original.name: Missiles of Adaptation
original.description: Additional forms provide multitudinous functions.

display.name: 自适应飞弹
display.description: 额外的形态提供了多种功能。

original.name: Cracked Viewer
original.description: It functions but should be replaced soon.

display.name: 碎裂的观察器
display.description: 能用，但应该很快就会被换掉。

original.name: Lens 1.0
original.description: You must stand closer to this unit so I can assess your weaknesses.

display.name: 镜头 1.0
display.description: 你必须站在离这个单位近一些的位置，这样我才能评估你的弱点。

original.name: Lens 2.0
original.description: Improvements have made this tool significantly more useful.

display.name: 镜头 2.0
display.description: 改进后，这个工具的实用性大大增加了。

original.name: Multiplanar Visual Adapter
original.description: I can assess your weaknesses from Mechanus itself now!

display.name: 多位面视觉适配器
display.description: 我现在可以从机械境评估你的弱点！

original.name: Battered Tool
original.description: Functionality is at minimum threshold.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Nordom's Specializations by $(amount)%

display.name: 破烂工具
display.description: 功能处于最低阈值。

effects.description: 使诺顿的专精效果提高 $(amount)%

original.name: Bent Screwdriver
original.description: To be used, the angle must be adjusted. It may be preferable for me to creak.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Nordom's Specializations by $(amount)%

display.name: 弯头螺丝刀
display.description: 使用时，必须调整角度。我可能更喜欢吱吱呀呀的声音。

effects.description: 使诺顿的专精效果提高 $(amount)%

original.name: Gear Wrench
original.description: Smoothly running gears are a simple pleasure.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Nordom's Specializations by $(amount)%

display.name: 零件扳手
display.description: 平稳运作的零件是一种简单的享受。

effects.description: 使诺顿的专精效果提高 $(amount)%

original.name: Welding Torch
original.description: All seams are optimal and ready for high stress!

effects.description: Increases the effect of Nordom's Specializations by $(amount)%

display.name: 焊枪
display.description: 所有的接缝都处于最佳状态，并准备好接受高压力的工作！

effects.description: 使诺顿的专精效果提高 $(amount)%

original.name: Rusted Gear
original.description: This gear can replace a broken one, but it is not an improvement.

display.name: 锈蚀的零件
display.description: 它可以取代破损的零件，但这算不上什么改进。

original.name: Lost Gear
original.description: Some machine is missing a vital component. Oh well -- more for me!

display.name: 丢失的零件
display.description: 有些机器缺少一个重要部件。哦，好吧--对我来说，多了！

original.name: Precision Gears
original.description: Synchronization=superior function

display.name: 精密的零件
display.description: 同步率代表着出色的性能。

original.name: Gears of Power
original.description: Properly placed these will improve capabilities on multiple levels.

display.name: 强力的零件
display.description: 适当放置这些将在多个层面上提高能力。

original.name: Bag of Coins
original.description: I have been holding onto this.

display.name: 金币袋
display.description: 我一直坚守着它。

original.name: 333 Copper Coins
original.description: The quantity is cumbersome.

display.name: 333 铜币
display.description: 有零有整。

original.name: Glass Eye
original.description: This is inefficient for purposes of seeing. But it is pleasantly shiny!

display.name: 玻璃眼
display.description: 对看东西没什么帮助。但它的光泽度真是赏心悦目！

original.name: Fanged Mirror of Yehcir-Eya
original.description: This is a dangerous artifact. Why no one has taken it from me is a puzzle.

display.name: 耶希尔·埃亚的獠牙镜
display.description: 这是一件危险的工艺品。为什么没有人从我这里拿走它，这是一个谜。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Nonbinary Champions by $(amount)%
所有非二元性别勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a STR score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有力量大于等于 13 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a INT score of 13 or higher in the formation
阵型中每有一位智力大于等于 13 的勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Lawful Champions by $(amount)%
使所有守序阵营勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
